WorkingGroupSection.title: Origin of the Working Group
WorkingGroupSection.text: On May 12-13, 2026, the National Commission to Combat Desertification (CNCD), through its PAB-Brazil Implementation Technical Chamber, resolved to create the GT-SEDES, in response to Objective 3.4 of the PAB. The group's goal was to collaboratively build each institution's contribution to the three SEDES modules and draft a Technical Cooperation Protocol.

0.title: Interinstitutional workshop
0.description: Methodological proposal and platform development presented and validated.

1.title: CNCD deliberation
1.description: Creation of the GT-SEDES approved in plenary, in response to Objective 3.4 of the PAB.

2.title: 1st GT-SEDES meeting
2.description: Held at CECAD (Brasília/DF), the formal start of the group's work.
